content.full_text:
July 26, 2000

Manuela Albuquerque
City Attorney
City of Berkeley
1947 Center Street, First Floor
Berkeley, CA 94704

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-169

Dear Ms. Albuquerque:

This letter is to confirm that your request for advice, received via facsimile by the Fair Political Practices Commission on July 24, 2000, has been withdrawn. If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Deborah Allison
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
